eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Garfield, CO; at 05:13 PM ON FEB 27, 2026 Effective until 06:13 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Attn: Garfield County, info from the Carbondale Police: Please be on the lookout for a missing and endangered adult described as a 77 year-old, white female, last seen wearing a black coat and white baseball hat. Uses a painted red walker. Call 911 if you see her.
